content:
💡 ghostty-config | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a user-friendly, visual interface for generating and customizing configuration files for the Ghostty terminal.
✨ Key Features: • Interactive settings editor for fonts, colors, cursor styles, transparency, blur, etc. • Font playground with support for various font types. • Live previews of cursors, selections, app icons, and color palettes. • One-click export of Ghostty configuration files.
📖 Summary: Ghostty Config is a web-based tool that simplifies the customization of the Ghostty terminal. It provides an intuitive interface for users to visually adjust settings like fonts, colors, and cursor styles, with live previews, and then export a ready-to-use configuration file.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
